headline: 3 Market-Beating Stocks to Keep an Eye On
summary: The best-performing stocks typically have robust sales growth, increasing margins, and rising returns on capital, and those that can maintain this trifecta year in and year out often become the legends of the investing world.

raw.headline: 3 Market-Beating Stocks to Keep an Eye On
raw.summary: The best-performing stocks typically have robust sales growth, increasing margins, and rising returns on capital, and those that can maintain this trifecta year in and year out often become the legends of the investing world.

headline: Bitcoin rebounds as XRP, Ethereum slide amid mixed market action
summary: Bitcoin (BTC) was back up above the $70,000 after the slide below the level a day earlier. At press time on March 20, King Crypto was trading near $70,563.09 after climbing up by 1.34% in the past 24 hours. However, its peers Ethereum (ETH) and XRP (XRP) were down in red, having dropped ...

headline: Robinhood Social Beta: Is it a New Driver of Top-Line Growth?
summary: HOOD tests Social beta with verified trader profiles and live trade sharing, aiming to boost engagement and drive more in-app trading activity.

headline: How is Robinhood’s Stock Performance Compared to Other Capital Markets Stock?
summary: Robinhood has outperformed other capital market stocks over the past year. Moreover, Wall Street analysts remain moderately optimistic about its prospects.

headline: I Predicted the 50% Plunge in Robinhood Stock. Here's What I Think Will Happen Next
summary: Robinhood's business is showing cracks, which is causing investors to rethink the company's sky-high valuation.
